subcodes.first_line: O trusted one! Upon thee be the favors of thy Lord, the All-Merciful, the Most Compassionate. Now that thou art upon the vast ocean in the ship [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حضرت امین علیک الطاف ربک الرحمن الرحیم الان که در محیط اعظم آب در کشتی
subcodes.subjects: @humility; meekness; lowliness, @praise and encouragement, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @health and healing; material and spiritual healing
